text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What's up, City? Somethin' on your<n>mind? I'm
here to listen, so let it all out!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Well... I was just thinking, I don't know<n>anything
about kids' fashion...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Clothes, huh? Well, I like sleeves that're<n>easy to
roll up so I can play in the sand.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wait, why're ya askin' me 'bout kids'<n>clothes?! I
just wear a size small in adult<n>sizes!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's not what I meant. For my next<n>job, I
have to do styling on a kids'<n>photoshoot.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Oh yeah, you have younger siblings.<n>What do
they usually wear?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Honestly, we give 'em the simplestclothes we can find. They'll only comehome covered in mud anyways!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I see... They'd do best in a natural<n>environment
where they feel<n>comfortable. But I don't wanna
get the<n>costumes dirty...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
City! City! You're overthinkin' it! You'll<n>scare the
tykes scrunchin' up your face<n>like that!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Remember to smile! The kids will be<n>happy with
whatever ya pick for 'em as<n>long as you look
happy stylin' them! I'm<n>sure you're gonna get
some great<n>photos!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Tamamo... You're right. Thanks for the<n>advice.
